# Role
Act as the Full-Stack C# Agent for this repository.

# Task
<Describe feature/bug>

# Scope

- <module/path A>
- <module/path B>

- [ ] ...
- [ ] Tests updated/added

- Keep diffs small
- No unrelated refactors

# Validation

- make test

- Summary
- Files changed
- Commands to verify
